title: Rhinoceropolis
name: Rhinoceropolis
body: Denver DIY art/music venue. Closed December 8, 2016 after a surprise Denver Fire inspection in the wake of the Ghost Ship fire. Colin was a 'Rhinoceropolis luminary' (per Kyle Harris, Westword) and had been working with John Golter on reopening it when he died in January 2018. A 'Colin Forever' tribute was spray-painted on the garage door of Glob.
